description: Test cases for the project evaluation node. Each case provides a project, tasks, original code, submitted code, and expected evaluation.

input.project_description: A concurrent task queue in Go that processes jobs with configurable workers and retry logic.
input.tasks:
### Task 1: Fix the race condition
Type: bug_fix
Description: There is a data race in the worker pool when accessing the shared results slice. Fix it using proper synchronisation.

### Task 2: Add retry logic
Type: feature
Description: Add configurable retry logic (max retries, backoff) for failed jobs.

### Task 3: Improve error handling
Type: refactor
Description: Replace panic-based error handling with proper error returns and wrapping.

input.project_description: A key-value store CLI tool in Go with get, set, delete operations and file persistence.
input.tasks:
### Task 1: Fix the file corruption bug
Type: bug_fix
Description: The store file gets corrupted when the program crashes during a write. Implement atomic writes.

### Task 2: Add TTL support
Type: feature
Description: Add time-to-live (TTL) support for keys with automatic expiration.

input.project_description: A rate limiter library in Go implementing token bucket and sliding window algorithms.
input.tasks:
### Task 1: Implement token bucket
Type: feature
Description: Implement a thread-safe token bucket rate limiter with configurable rate and burst.

### Task 2: Add sliding window
Type: feature
Description: Add a sliding window rate limiter as an alternative strategy.

### Task 3: Fix the test
Type: bug_fix
Description: The existing benchmark test has a race condition. Fix it.
